creator: xenophon+freebsd@irtnog.org
text:
ownCloud 4.5.5 fixes several security vulnerabilities (an authentication bypass bug as well as a cross-site scripting attack) as well as a number of different defects.  The full list is at http://owncloud.org/changelog/.

Fix: Please apply the following patch after confirming the checksums:



PORTNAME=      owncloud
-PORTVERSION=   4.5.4
+PORTVERSION=   4.5.5
 CATEGORIES=    www
 MASTER_SITES=  http://owncloud.org/releases/--JiXFuivV3yLTogTo9JIGPKNfOJUq5V5F6OIWjiIBkpjTudzX
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

Index: www/owncloud/distinfo
===================================================================
--- www/owncloud/distinfo       (revision 309561)
+++ www/owncloud/distinfo       (working copy)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (owncloud-4.5.4.tar.bz2) = 13e3be1c90e41d520123a1d0daeb4f594ad04dca7b318f999a6573088cf40657
-SIZE (owncloud-4.5.4.tar.bz2) = 9159486
+SHA256 (owncloud-4.5.5.tar.bz2) = 9b83ca00893df8351d374bcf87d99b22fcf929b479fc2af9e88be9d860a304ea
+SIZE (owncloud-4.5.5.tar.bz2) = 9168561
Index: www/owncloud/Makefile
===================================================================
--- www/owncloud/Makefile       (revision 309561)
+++ www/owncloud/Makefile       (working copy)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
How-To-Repeat: N/A
